creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
dinoex      2006-10-07 18:26:40 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    graphics             Makefile 
  Added files:
    graphics/photoclip   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  PhotoClip is a simple image viewer and editor mostly designed
  for digital camera pictures. The plan is to make a program with
  elegant and intuitive interface which at the same time will be
  powerful enough o be useful.
  PR:             104066
  Submitted by:   Gürkan Sengün
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.992     +1 -0      ports/graphics/Makefile
  1.1       +27 -0     ports/graphics/photoclip/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/graphics/photoclip/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/graphics/photoclip/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +10 -0     ports/graphics/photoclip/pkg-plist (new)
